summary: DMT (Domestic Money Transfer) frontend and backend testing completed. All 28 tests passed (19 backend pytest, 9 frontend Playwright). DMT APIs are working correctly. A potential bug was identified where DMTPage.js reads from 'user' localStorage key but login stores under 'paras_user', causing wallet to show 0 PRC.

ui_bugs.issue: DMT page shows 0 PRC balance after login because it reads from localStorage.getItem('user') on line 36, but login stores user data under 'paras_user' key. This is a localStorage key mismatch.

action_items: FIX BUG: In DMTPage.js line 36, change `localStorage.getItem('user')` to `localStorage.getItem('paras_user')` to match the login storage key
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user mail2avhale@gmail.com with EKO registered customer 9970100782
context_for_next_testing_agent: DMT feature tests created. All APIs (health, customer search, recipients, wallet, transactions, transfer) tested and working. Frontend UI tests verify DMT page loads correctly with all tabs (Transfer, Add Account, History) and conversion info. Note: The wallet shows 0 PRC due to localStorage key mismatch bug.
rca_of_issue: The DMTPage.js component reads user data from localStorage using the key 'user' (line 36), but the login flow stores user data under the key 'paras_user'. This causes the wallet balance to display as 0 PRC on the DMT page. The fix is to change the localStorage key in DMTPage.js from 'user' to 'paras_user'.
